arm_grant_air_cas_extended_tech_tree_1960 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_bombs }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

arm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_extended_tech_tree_1960 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_bomber }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1933 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
        }
        add_technology = early_bomber
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tactical_bomber1 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
        }
        add_technology = tactical_bomber1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tactical_bomber2 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
        }
        add_technology = tactical_bomber2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tactical_bomber3 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
        }
        add_technology = tactical_bomber3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = jet_tactical_bomber1 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers

        add_technology = jet_tactical_bomber1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {

            NOT = { has_tech = jet_tactical_bomber2 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_transport_plane }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1933 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
        }
        add_technology = early_transport_plane
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {

arm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_extended_tech_tree_1960 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = electronic_mechanical_engineering }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = electronic_mechanical_engineering
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = radio }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = radio
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = mechanical_computing }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = mechanical_computing
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_fire_control_system }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_fire_control_system }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = improved_fire_control_system
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_fire_control_system }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = advanced_fire_control_system
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_radio }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = improved_radio
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = computing_machine }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = computing_machine
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_encryption }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

arm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_extended_tech_tree_1960 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_fortification_tech }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
        }
        add_technology = basic_fortification_tech
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = coastal_fort_tech_1 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

arm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_extended_tech_tree_1960 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = atomic_research }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = atomic_research
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = isotope_separation_centrifugal }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = isotope_separation_centrifugal
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = nuclear_reactor }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = nuclear_reactor
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = nuclear_reactor_heavy_water }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = nuclear_reactor_heavy_water
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = nukes }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = nukes
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = thermonuclear_bombs }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = thermonuclear_bombs
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
        }
        add_technology = postwar_radar_tech_5
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = air_air_missile_4 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1960 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
            has_tech = sp_rockets_improved_guidance_4
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = air_air_missile_4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = hardened_silo }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes

            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = sp_sam_missile_2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = sp_nuclear_missile_1 }

arm_grant_land_anti_air_extended_tech_tree_1960 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = infantry_aa }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1025 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
            has_tech = sp_rockets_improved_guidance_4
        }
        add_technology = infantry_aa
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = interwar_antiair }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = interwar_antiair
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antiair1 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = antiair1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antiair2 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = antiair2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antiair3 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = antiair3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antiair4 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = antiair4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antiair5 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air

        add_technology = antiair5
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antiair_a }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air

            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1947 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air

            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

    if = {

            NOT = { has_tech = antiair_d }

            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
            has_tech = postwar_radar_tech_2

    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antiair_e }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1955 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = antiair_e
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antiair_f }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1960 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = antiair_f
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}
















arm_grant_land_anti_tank_extended_tech_tree_1960 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = mountain_tanks }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = mountain_tanks
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = interwar_antitank }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = interwar_antitank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = SWE_bofors_antitank_gun }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = SWE_bofors_antitank_gun
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antitank1 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank

        add_technology = antitank1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antitank2 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = antitank2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antitank3 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = antitank3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antitank4 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank

arm_grant_land_artillery_extended_tech_tree_1960 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = gw_artillery }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery

    }

            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"

        }
        add_technology = modern_dp_light_battery
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = artillery_e }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1955 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = artillery_e
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = artillery_f }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1960 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = artillery_f
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_heavy_tank }

            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = support_weapons }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry

        }
        add_technology = advanced_infantry_weapons2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = elite_forces }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = elite_forces
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

arm_grant_land_light_tanks_extended_tech_tree_1960 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = gwtank }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        add_technology = gwtank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = gwtank_chassis }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = gwtank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_light_tank }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        add_technology = basic_light_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_light_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = basic_light_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_light_tank }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        add_technology = improved_light_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_light_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = improved_light_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = paradrop_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_tech = paras_airborne_light_armor
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = paradrop_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_light_tank }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        add_technology = advanced_light_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_light_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_light_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = modern_light_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = modern_light_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = paradrop_tank_chassis_2 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_tech = paradrop_tank_chassis
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = paradrop_tank_chassis_2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}













arm_grant_land_mechanised_extended_tech_tree_1960 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = mechanised_infantry }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = mechanised_infantry
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = amphibious_mechanized_infantry }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = amphibious_mechanized_infantry
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = mechanised_infantry2 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = mechanised_infantry2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = amphibious_mechanized_infantry_2 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = amphibious_mechanized_infantry_2

    }
    if = {

            NOT = { has_tech = mechanised_infantry3 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = mechanised_infantry3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = mechanised_infantry4 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1947 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = mechanised_infantry4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = mechanised_infantry5 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = mechanised_infantry5
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = mechanised_infantry6 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1953 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = mechanised_infantry6
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = amphibious_mechanized_infantry_3 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1953 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = amphibious_mechanized_infantry_3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = mechanised_infantry7 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1960 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = mechanised_infantry7
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ifv_infantry }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1960 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = ifv_infantry
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}











arm_grant_land_medium_tanks_extended_tech_tree_1960 = {

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_medium_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = basic_medium_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_medium_tank }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_medium_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = improved_medium_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_medium_tank }

arm_grant_land_tanks_generic_extended_tech_tree_1960 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = armored_car1 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1914 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        add_technology = armored_car1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_light_td }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        add_technology = basic_light_td
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_light_art }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

arm_grant_naval_battleships_extended_tech_tree_1960 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_battlecruiser }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        add_technology = early_battlecruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_battleship }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        add_technology = early_battleship
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_ship_hull_heavy }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = early_ship_hull_heavy
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_battleship }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

        }
        add_technology = ship_asm_battery_1_tech
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ship_sam_missile_battery_1_tech }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1955 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = ship_sam_missile_battery_1_tech
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ship_dp_missile_battery_1_tech }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1955 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            has_tech = ship_sam_missile_battery_1_tech
            has_tech = ship_asm_battery_1_tech
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = ship_dp_missile_battery_1_tech
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ship_dp_missile_battery_2_tech }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1955 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            has_tech = ship_sam_missile_battery_2_tech
            has_tech = ship_asm_battery_2_tech
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = ship_dp_missile_battery_2_tech
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ship_asm_battery_2_tech }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1960 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            has_tech = sp_rockets_improved_guidance_4
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = ship_asm_battery_2_tech
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ship_sam_missile_battery_2_tech }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1960 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            has_tech = sp_rockets_improved_guidance_4
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = ship_sam_missile_battery_2_tech
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}
















arm_grant_naval_carriers_extended_tech_tree_1960 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_carrier }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
        }
        add_technology = early_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_ship_hull_carrier }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = early_ship_hull_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_carrier }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
        }
        add_technology = basic_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_ship_hull_carrier }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = basic_ship_hull_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ship_hull_escort_carrier }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = ship_hull_escort_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_ship_hull_carrier }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = improved_ship_hull_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_carrier }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
        }
        add_technology = improved_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = sp_refined_pykrete }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"

        add_technology = sp_refined_pykrete
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_ship_hull_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

    if = {

            NOT = { has_tech = sp_ice_composite_runawayas }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = sp_ice_composite_runawayas
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_carrier }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
        }
        add_technology = advanced_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ship_hull_carrier_4 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1949 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = ship_hull_carrier_4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ship_hull_carrier_5 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1954 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = ship_hull_carrier_5
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ship_hull_carrier_6 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1958 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = ship_hull_carrier_6
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }

arm_grant_naval_destroyers_extended_tech_tree_1960 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_destroyer }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
        }
        add_technology = early_destroyer
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_ship_hull_light }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = early_ship_hull_light
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = smoke_generator }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"

            NOT = { has_tech = basic_destroyer }

            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
        }
        add_technology = basic_destroyer
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_ship_hull_light }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"

        add_technology = basic_ship_hull_light

    if = {

            NOT = { has_tech = improved_sonar }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"

            NOT = { has_tech = improved_ship_hull_light }

            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            NOT = { has_tech = modern_sonar }

            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            NOT = { has_tech = ship_hull_light_6 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1954 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            NOT = { has_tech = ship_hull_light_7 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1958 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }

arm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers_extended_tech_tree_1960 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_heavy_cruiser }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = early_heavy_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_heavy_cruiser }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = basic_heavy_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_heavy_cruiser }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = improved_heavy_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_heavy_cruiser }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = advanced_heavy_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}














arm_grant_naval_light_cruisers_extended_tech_tree_1960 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_light_cruiser }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
        }

arm_grant_naval_naval_support_extended_tech_tree_1960 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = transport }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
        }
        add_technology = transport
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_torpedo }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = basic_torpedo
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_naval_mines }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = naval_mines_1950
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }

arm_grant_naval_submarines_extended_tech_tree_1960 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_submarine }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
        }
        add_technology = early_submarine
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_ship_hull_submarine }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = early_ship_hull_submarine
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = midget_submarine }

            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
